revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=高市御県神社 |画像= |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 17 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP |祭神=[[天津彦根命]]
[[高皇産霊神]] |社格=[[式内社]]（名神大）
旧[[無格社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |別名= |例祭=[[10月13日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）で旧[[社格]]は[[無格社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、[[大同]]年間に「高市御縣神社[[神封]]二戸」と記載があり（[[新抄格勅符抄]]）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。[[延喜式神名帳]]には[[名神大社]]として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「大和国六御県神社」の一座として朝廷からの崇敬があつかった。江戸時代は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === [[貞観]]元年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]従五位下から従五位上『[[日本三代実録]]』 == 関連項目 == {{Commonscat|Musanimasu-jinja}} * [[大和国の式内社一覧]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html 高市御県神社]

旧[[無格社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |別名= |例祭=[[10月13日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]である。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）で、旧[[社格]]は[[無格社]]。 == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、[[大同]]年間に「高市御縣神社[[神封]]二戸」と記載があり（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。[[延喜式神名帳]]には[[名神大社]]として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「[[倭の六県|大和国六御県]]神社」の一座として[[朝廷]]からの崇敬が篤かった。[[江戸時代]]は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』） == 関連項目 == * [[大和国の式内社一覧]] * [[倭の六県]] == 外部リンク == * [http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html 高市御県神社] {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]]

旧[[無格社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |別名= |例祭=[[10月13日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）で、旧[[社格]]は[[無格社]]。 ==祭神== *[[天津彦根命]]（あまつひこねのみこと） *[[高皇産霊神]]（たかみむすびのかみ） == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間に「高市御縣神社[[神封]]二戸」と記載があり（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。[[延喜式神名帳]]には[[名神大社]]として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「[[倭の六県|大和国六御県]]神社」の一座として[[朝廷]]からの崇敬が篤かった。[[江戸時代]]は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』） == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：[[近鉄橿原線]][[八木西口駅]]下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） == 関連項目 == * [[大和国の式内社一覧]] * [[倭の六県]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{shinto-stub}} {{神道 横}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]]

旧[[無格社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |別名= |例祭=[[10月13日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）で、旧[[社格]]は[[無格社]]。 ==祭神== *[[天津彦根命]]（あまつひこねのみこと） *[[高皇産霊神]]（たかみむすびのかみ） == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間に「高市御縣神社[[神封]]二戸」と記載があり（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。[[延喜式神名帳]]には[[名神大社]]として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「[[倭の六県|大和国六御県]]神社」の一座として[[朝廷 (日本)|朝廷]]からの崇敬が篤かった。[[江戸時代]]は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』） == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：[[近鉄橿原線]][[八木西口駅]]下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[大和国の式内社一覧]] * [[倭の六県]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]]

旧[[無格社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |別名= |例祭=[[10月13日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）で、旧[[社格]]は[[無格社]]。 ==祭神== *[[天津彦根命]]（あまつひこねのみこと） *[[高皇産霊神]]（たかみむすびのかみ） == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間に「高市御縣神社[[神封]]二戸」と記載があり（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。[[延喜式神名帳]]には[[名神大社]]として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「[[倭の六県|大和国六御県]]神社」の一座として[[朝廷 (日本)|朝廷]]からの崇敬が篤かった。[[江戸時代]]は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』） == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：[[近鉄橿原線]][[八木西口駅]]下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[大和国の式内社一覧]] * [[倭の六県]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]]

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{pp-vandalism|small=yes}} {{出典の明記|date=2017年12月}} {{神社 |名称=高市御県神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=橿原市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 16.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-29 |祭神=[[天津彦根命]]
[[高皇産霊神]] |社格=[[式内社]]（名神大）
旧[[無格社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |別名= |例祭=[[10月13日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）で、旧[[社格]]は[[無格社]]。 ==祭神== *[[天津彦根命]]（あまつひこねのみこと） *[[高皇産霊神]]（たかみむすびのかみ） == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間に「高市御縣神社[[神封]]二戸」と記載があり（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。[[延喜式神名帳]]には[[名神大社]]として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「[[倭の六県|大和国六御県]]神社」の一座として[[朝廷 (日本)|朝廷]]からの崇敬が篤かった。[[江戸時代]]は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』） == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：[[近鉄橿原線]][[八木西口駅]]下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[大和国の式内社一覧]] * [[倭の六県]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 16.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-29 |祭神=[[天津彦根命]]
[[高皇産霊神]] |社格=[[式内社]]（名神大）
旧[[無格社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |別名= |例祭=[[10月13日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）で、旧[[社格]]は[[無格社]]。 ==祭神== *[[天津彦根命]]（あまつひこねのみこと） *[[高皇産霊神]]（たかみむすびのかみ） == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間に「高市御縣神社[[神封]]二戸」と記載があり（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。[[延喜式神名帳]]には[[名神大社]]として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「[[倭の六県|大和国六御県]]神社」の一座として[[朝廷 (日本)|朝廷]]からの崇敬が篤かった。[[江戸時代]]は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』） == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：[[近鉄橿原線]][[八木西口駅]]下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[大和国の式内社一覧]] * [[倭の六県]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]] ==End Japanese==

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地=[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 16.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-29 |祭神=[[天津彦根命]]
[[高皇産霊神]] |社格=[[式内社]]（名神大）
旧[[無格社]] |創建=不詳 |本殿=[[春日造]] |別名= |例祭=[[10月13日]] |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]にある[[神社]]。[[式内社]]（[[名神大社]]）で、旧[[社格]]は[[無格社]]。 ==祭神== *[[天津彦根命]]（あまつひこねのみこと） *[[高皇産霊神]]（たかみむすびのかみ） == 歴史 == === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、[[大同 (日本)|大同]]年間に「高市御縣神社[[神封]]二戸」と記載があり（『[[新抄格勅符抄]]』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。[[延喜式神名帳]]には[[名神大社]]として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「[[倭の六県|大和国六御県]]神社」の一座として[[朝廷 (日本)|朝廷]]からの崇敬が篤かった。[[江戸時代]]は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * [[天安 (日本)|天安]]3年（[[859年]]）[[1月27日]]、従五位下から従五位上（『[[日本三代実録]]』） == 現地情報 == ;所在地 *[[奈良県]][[橿原市]]四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：[[近鉄橿原線]][[八木西口駅]]下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 関連項目 == * [[大和国の式内社一覧]] * [[倭の六県]] == 外部リンク == *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]]

{{nihongo|'''Takechino Miagata Shrine'''|高市御県神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高市御県神社]] {{wikidata link|Q43594646}} == Japanese content == {{pp-vandalism|small=yes}} {{出典の明記|date=2017年12月}} {{神社 |名称=高市御県神社 |画像={{画像募集中|cat=橿原市}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}四条町761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 16.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-29 |祭神={{jalink|天津彦根命}}
{{jalink|高皇産霊神}} |社格={{jalink|式内社}}（名神大）
旧{{jalink|無格社}} |創建=不詳 |本殿={{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |別名= |例祭={{jalink|10月13日|Q2925}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|無格社}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|天津彦根命}}（あまつひこねのみこと） *{{jalink|高皇産霊神}}（たかみむすびのかみ） === 歴史 === === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}年間に「高市御縣神社{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}二戸」と記載があり（『{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「{{jalink|倭の六県|Q55521849|大和国六御県}}神社」の一座として{{jalink|朝廷 (日本)|Q30253177|朝廷}}からの崇敬が篤かった。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：{{jalink|近鉄橿原線|Q2491066}}{{jalink|八木西口駅|Q8046713}}下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427}} * {{jalink|倭の六県|Q55521849}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]]

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}四条町761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 16.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-29 |祭神={{jalink|天津彦根命}}
{{jalink|高皇産霊神}} |社格={{jalink|式内社}}（名神大）
旧{{jalink|無格社}} |創建=不詳 |本殿={{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |別名= |例祭={{jalink|10月13日|Q2925}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|無格社}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|天津彦根命}}（あまつひこねのみこと） *{{jalink|高皇産霊神}}（たかみむすびのかみ） === 歴史 === === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}年間に「高市御縣神社{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}二戸」と記載があり（『{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「{{jalink|倭の六県|Q55521849|大和国六御県}}神社」の一座として{{jalink|朝廷 (日本)|Q30253177|朝廷}}からの崇敬が篤かった。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：{{jalink|近鉄橿原線|Q2491066}}{{jalink|八木西口駅|Q8046713}}下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427}} * {{jalink|倭の六県|Q55521849}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:need translation]]

旧{{jalink|無格社}} |創建=不詳 |本殿={{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |別名= |例祭={{jalink|10月13日|Q2925}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|無格社}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|天津彦根命}}（あまつひこねのみこと） *{{jalink|高皇産霊神}}（たかみむすびのかみ） === 歴史 === === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}年間に「高市御縣神社{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}二戸」と記載があり（『{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「{{jalink|倭の六県|Q55521849|大和国六御県}}神社」の一座として{{jalink|朝廷 (日本)|Q30253177|朝廷}}からの崇敬が篤かった。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：{{jalink|近鉄橿原線|Q2491066}}{{jalink|八木西口駅|Q8046713}}下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427}} * {{jalink|倭の六県|Q55521849}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:need translation]]

旧{{jalink|無格社}} |創建=不詳 |本殿={{jalink|春日造|Q3193781}} |別名= |例祭={{jalink|10月13日|Q2925}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''高市御県神社'''（たけちのみあがたじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|式内社}}（{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}）で、旧{{jalink|社格|Q10444029}}は{{jalink|無格社}}。 ===祭神=== *{{jalink|天津彦根命}}（あまつひこねのみこと） *{{jalink|高皇産霊神}}（たかみむすびのかみ） === 歴史 === === 概史 === 創建年代は不詳だが、{{jalink|大同 (日本)|Q1373191|大同}}年間に「高市御縣神社{{jalink|神封|Q1689534}}二戸」と記載があり（『{{jalink|新抄格勅符抄|Q11502312}}』）、それ以前から存在したと推測される。{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}には{{jalink|名神大社|Q9610964}}として登載され、高市、葛木、十市、志貴、山辺、曽布と共に「{{jalink|倭の六県|Q55521849|大和国六御県}}神社」の一座として{{jalink|朝廷 (日本)|Q30253177|朝廷}}からの崇敬が篤かった。{{jalink|江戸時代|Q184963}}は「高県宮」「十三社（所）大明神」などと称していた。 === 神階 === * {{jalink|天安 (日本)|Q1075611|天安}}3年（{{jalink|859年|Q23897}}）{{jalink|1月27日|Q2284}}、従五位下から従五位上（『{{jalink|日本三代実録|Q1052981}}』） === 現地情報 === ;所在地 *{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|橿原市|Q496319}}四条町761 ;交通アクセス 最寄駅：{{jalink|近鉄橿原線|Q2491066}}{{jalink|八木西口駅|Q8046713}}下車後、徒歩約7分（南に約700ｍ） === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 関連項目 === * {{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427}} * {{jalink|倭の六県|Q55521849}} === 外部リンク === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - 奈良県神社青年会] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:need translation]]

City}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 16.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-29 |祭神={{jalink|Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto}}
{{jalink|Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (myōjin taisha)
former {{jalink|unranked shrine}} |創建=Unknown |本殿={{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |別名= |例祭={{jalink|October 13|Q2925}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Takechi no Miagata Shrine''' (たけちのみあがたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}), and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|unranked shrine}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{jalink|Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{jalink|Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{jalink|Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{jalink|shinpū|Q1689534}}" (''{{jalink|Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a {{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{jalink|Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province}}" and received deep reverence from the {{jalink|Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|imperial court}}. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{jalink|Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713}} on the {{jalink|Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427}} * {{jalink|Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:need translation]]

It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}), and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|unranked shrine}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{jalink|Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{jalink|Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{jalink|Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{jalink|shinpū|Q1689534}}" (''{{jalink|Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a {{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{jalink|Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province}}" and received deep reverence from the {{jalink|Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|imperial court}}. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{jalink|Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713}} on the {{jalink|Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427}} * {{jalink|Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]] [[Category:need translation]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: used local AI agents to translate these pages. Contrary to the description it was actually Claude Code for a few, OpenClaw with Codex, and regular Codex. Ollama and DeepSeek were too bad to actually use. see categorization since some of them are very questionable, especially if there was a massive decrease in page size or the {{jawiki| template is minimal or absent on the page

'language': 'ja'} [[JA:高市御県神社]] {{wikidata link|Q43594646}} == Japanese content == {{pp-vandalism|small=yes}} {{出典の明記|date=December 2017}} {{神社 |名称=Takechi no Miagata Shrine |画像={{画像募集中|cat=Kashihara City}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 16.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-29 |祭神={{jalink|Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto}}
{{jalink|Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (myōjin taisha)
former {{jalink|unranked shrine}} |創建=Unknown |本殿={{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |別名= |例祭={{jalink|October 13|Q2925}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Takechi no Miagata Shrine''' (たけちのみあがたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}), and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|unranked shrine}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{jalink|Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{jalink|Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{jalink|Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{jalink|shinpū|Q1689534}}" (''{{jalink|Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a {{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{jalink|Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province}}" and received deep reverence from the {{jalink|Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|imperial court}}. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{jalink|Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713}} on the {{jalink|Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427}} * {{jalink|Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]]

City}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=270}} |所在地={{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 | 緯度度 = 34 | 緯度分 = 30 | 緯度秒 = 16.9 | N(北緯)及びS(南緯) = N | 経度度 = 135 |経度分 = 47 | 経度秒 = 20.6 | E(東経)及びW(西経) = E | 地図国コード = JP-29 |祭神={{jalink|Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto}}
{{jalink|Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} |社格={{jalink|Shikinaisha}} (myōjin taisha)
former {{jalink|unranked shrine}} |創建=Unknown |本殿={{jalink|Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781}} |別名= |例祭={{jalink|October 13|Q2925}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Takechi no Miagata Shrine''' (たけちのみあがたじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} in {{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. It is a {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} ({{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}), and its former {{jalink|shrine rank|Q10444029}} was {{jalink|unranked shrine}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{jalink|Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{jalink|Takamimusubi-no-Kami}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{jalink|Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{jalink|shinpū|Q1689534}}" (''{{jalink|Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a {{jalink|myōjin taisha|Q9610964}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{jalink|Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province}}" and received deep reverence from the {{jalink|Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|imperial court}}. In the {{jalink|Edo period|Q184963}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{jalink|Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|Ten'an}} 3 ({{jalink|859|Q23897}}), {{jalink|January 27|Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{jalink|Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashihara|Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{jalink|Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713}} on the {{jalink|Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427}} * {{jalink|Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}}), and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029}} was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=unranked shrine|UNKNOWN}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto|UNKNOWN}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|UNKNOWN}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534}}" (''{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}'' it is listed as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|lt=Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province}}" and received deep reverence from the {{ill|lt=Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|WD=Q30253177|lt=imperial court}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara|Q496319|WD=Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{ill|lt=Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713|WD=Q8046713}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066|WD=Q2491066}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427}} * {{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara|Q496319|WD=Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{ill|lt=Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713|WD=Q8046713}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066|WD=Q2491066}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427}} * {{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara|Q496319|WD=Q496319}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{ill|lt=Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713|WD=Q8046713}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066|WD=Q2491066}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427}} * {{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=unranked shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}}" (''{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|lt=Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province|1=The Six Prefectures of Wa}}" and received deep reverence from the {{ill|lt=Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|WD=Q30253177|lt=imperial court|1=Imperial Court of Japan}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{ill|lt=Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713|WD=Q8046713|1=Yagi-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066|WD=Q2491066|1=Kashihara Line}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} * {{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|1=The Six Prefectures of Wa}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:たけちのみあかたしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=unranked shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}}" (''{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|lt=Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province|1=The Six Prefectures of Wa}}" and received deep reverence from the {{ill|lt=Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|WD=Q30253177|lt=imperial court|1=Imperial Court of Japan}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{ill|lt=Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713|WD=Q8046713|1=Yagi-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066|WD=Q2491066|1=Kashihara Line}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} * {{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|1=The Six Prefectures of Wa}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:奈良県の神社]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:橿原市の建築物]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:名神大社]][[Category:qq]]

It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=unranked shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}}" (''{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|lt=Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province|1=The Six Prefectures of Wa}}" and received deep reverence from the {{ill|lt=Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|WD=Q30253177|lt=imperial court|1=Imperial Court of Japan}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{ill|lt=Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713|WD=Q8046713|1=Yagi-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066|WD=Q2491066|1=Kashihara Line}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} * {{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|1=The Six Prefectures of Wa}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Buildings in Kashihara, Nara]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]]

{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} |社格={{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} (myōjin taisha)
former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=unranked shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |創建=Unknown |本殿={{ill|lt=Kasuga-zukuri|Q3193781|WD=Q3193781|1=Kasuga-zukuri}} |別名= |例祭={{ill|lt=October 13|Q2925|WD=Q2925|1=October 13}} |地図= Japan Nara }} '''Takechi no Miagata Shrine''' (たけちのみあがたじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Kashihara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. It is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} ({{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}), and its former {{ill|lt=shrine rank|Q10444029|WD=Q10444029|1=Shakaku}} was {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=unranked shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. ===Enshrined deities=== *{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amatsu-hikone-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} (あまつひこねのみこと) *{{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q125400|lt=Takamimusubi-no-Kami|1=Takamimusubi}} (たかみむすびのかみ) === History === === Outline === The date of foundation is unknown, but in the {{ill|lt=Daidō (Japan)|Q1373191|WD=Q1373191|lt=Daidō|1=Daidō}} era it is recorded as "Takechi no Agata Shrine, two households of {{ill|lt=shinpū|Q1689534|WD=Q1689534|1=Shinpo}}" (''{{ill|lt=Shinshō Kakuchokufu-shō|Q11502312|WD=Q11502312|1=Shinshō Kyakuchokufushō}}''), suggesting it already existed before then. In the ''{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}'' it is listed as a {{ill|lt=myōjin taisha|Q9610964|WD=Q9610964|1=Myōjin Taisha}}, and along with Takechi, Katsuraki, Tōichi, Shiki, Yamabe, and Sofu, it was one of the "{{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|lt=Six Miagata Shrines of Yamato Province|1=The Six Prefectures of Wa}}" and received deep reverence from the {{ill|lt=Imperial Court of Japan|Q30253177|WD=Q30253177|lt=imperial court|1=Imperial Court of Japan}}. In the {{ill|lt=Edo period|Q184963|WD=Q184963|1=Edo period}}, it was called "Takagata-no-miya" and "Jūsansha (sho) Daimyōjin." === Divine rank === * {{ill|lt=Ten'an (Japan)|Q1075611|WD=Q1075611|lt=Ten'an|1=Ten'an}} 3 ({{ill|lt=859|Q23897|WD=Q23897|1=859}}), {{ill|lt=January 27|Q2284|WD=Q2284|1=January 27}}: promoted from Junior Fifth Rank, Lower Grade to Junior Fifth Rank, Upper Grade (''{{ill|lt=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku|Q1052981|WD=Q1052981|1=Nihon Sandai Jitsuroku}}'') === Site information === ;Location *{{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashihara|Q496319|WD=Q496319|1=Kashihara, Nara}} Shijō-chō 761 ;Access Nearest station: about 7 minutes on foot (about 700 m south) from {{ill|lt=Yagi-Nishiguchi Station|Q8046713|WD=Q8046713|1=Yagi-nishiguchi Station}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Kashihara Line|Q2491066|WD=Q2491066|1=Kashihara Line}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === See also === * {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} * {{ill|lt=Six Agata of Yamato|Q55521849|WD=Q55521849|1=The Six Prefectures of Wa}} === External links === *[http://www.narashinsei.com/search/%E3%82%BF%E8%A1%8C/%E9%AB%98%E5%B8%82%E5%BE%A1%E7%9C%8C%E7%A5%9E%E7%A4%BE/ 高市御県神社 - Nara Prefecture Shinto Youth Association] * {{Wayback|url=http://www.geocities.jp/engisiki/yamato/html/031309-01.html |title=高市御県神社 |date=20181001131657}} {{神道 横}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Takechino Miagata Shrine]][[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:奈良県の旧無格社]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kashihara, Nara]] [[Category:橿原市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Myōjin Taisha]]
